content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9579929/", "source_title": "Retention, Fasting Patterns, and Weight Loss With an Intermittent ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "We assembled height, weight, fasting, and demographic data of adult users (ages 18-100 years) of the LIFE Fasting Tracker and LIFE Extend...", "direct_quote": "We assembled height, weight, fasting, and demographic data of adult users (ages 18-100 years) of the LIFE Fasting Tracker and LIFE Extend apps from 2018 to 2020.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Retention for up to 52 weeks was quantified based on recorded fasts and correlated with user demographics.", "direct_quote": "Retention for up to 52 weeks was quantified based on recorded fasts and correlated with user demographics.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Of these, 132,775 (16.7%) users were retained at 13 weeks, 54,881 (6.9%) at 26 weeks, and 16,478 (2.1%) at 52 weeks, allowing 4 consecutive...", "direct_quote": "Of these, 132,775 (16.7%) users were retained at 13 weeks, 54,881 (6.9%) at 26 weeks, and 16,478 (2.1%) at 52 weeks, allowing 4 consecutive weeks of inactivity.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Retention, Fasting Patterns, and Weight Loss With an Intermi."}]}
